title: eusteralis pentagona
side_effects: Eusteralis pentagona can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing allergic reactions, skin irritation, and respiratory issues in some individuals. Prolonged exposure to its toxic compounds can lead to dizziness, nausea, and even liver damage if ingested. In extreme cases, improper use of Eusteralis pentagona can result in anaphylaxis, a life-threatening condition that requires immediate medical attention. It's essential to handle the plant with caution and follow proper guidelines to minimize potential health risks.
